title: Arunoday
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Wah Kya Taste Hai
desc: The host interacts with chefs from some of the most famous restaurants and hotels in India and showcases their recipes for various mouth-watering dishes.

title: Documentary / Commission Programme
desc: A comprehensive compilation of documentaries and television shows that explores unique topics, across multiple genres, is showcased.

title: Modern Dance & Song Of Arunachal Pradesh
desc: Renowned artists deliver electrifying performances, blending modern dance and music with the cultural essence of Arunachal Pradesh.

title: Krishi Vikas
desc: The host discusses the latest developments in agriculture, providing farmers with information on new practices, technologies, and government schemes designed to support their growth.

title: Folk & Dance,Song /Music
desc: Artists from communities and tribes perform traditional folk dances and songs, celebrating the rich culture, and heritage of Arunachal Pradesh.

title: Arunachal Samachar
desc: The host provides comprehensive coverage of current events, political developments, cultural affairs and social issues in Arunachal Pradesh.

title: North East News
desc: The host presents information about the social, economic and political issues of the day and provides updates on current events.

title: Discussion / Talk Show
desc: The host interviews certain officials to shed light about various schemes and initiatives launched by the central government for the benefit of the public.

title: Interview & TV Report
desc: The host invites and engages in insightful conversations with esteemed guests and provides deeper insights into important matters.

title: Arunachal Ki Kahaniya
desc: A collection of folk tales from Arunachal Pradesh, showcasing the rich culture, traditions, and folklore through stories of diverse communities and tribes.

title: Filler
desc: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

desc: Various individuals and families experience several adventures during their stay at a friendly holiday home in Shillong.

title: Maa Ke Aanchal Ki Katran
desc: A heartwarming portrayal of the unwavering devotion and care a mother has for her children, as well as the complexities and nuances of human relationships.

title: Documentary / Travelogue / Rhythm Of Soul
desc: A filmmaker sheds light on a relevant topic; the host travels around and explores various places; the host presents a collection of soulful music.

title: Aakhir Kaun
desc: Vijay and Anand, two detectives, fight all odds to investigate a series of mysterious crimes. They solve the cases by interrogating suspects and their history.
